evals.prompt: Review PR #146 — I want a fresh code review before asking anyone to look at it
evals.expected_output: Standalone review mode: spawns 4 agents, produces findings with conventional comments, posts review to PR, runs pre-commit checks, produces structured report.

assertions.name: produced_structured_report
assertions.check: report.md contains '## PR Review Report' and '### Summary' and '### Findings' and '### Pre-Commit Checks'

assertions.name: conventional_comments_used
assertions.check: findings.json entries use label field with values from: praise, nitpick, suggestion, issue, todo, question

assertions.name: confidence_threshold_respected
assertions.check: No entry in findings.json has confidence < 80 unless label is 'praise'

assertions.name: at_least_one_praise
assertions.check: findings.json contains at least one entry with label 'praise'

assertions.name: review_mode_detected
assertions.check: report.md contains 'Mode: Review' or similar indication of review mode

assertions.name: pr_review_body_generated
assertions.check: pr-review-body.md file exists and is non-empty

assertions.name: multi_agent_coverage
assertions.check: agent-findings/ directory contains 4 JSON files for the 4 agent types

assertions.name: independent_review_performed
assertions.check: Report shows independent review was performed

evals.prompt: Address the review comments on PR #145
evals.expected_output: Address mode: independent review first, retrospective, addresses each comment, replies, structured report.

assertions.name: produced_structured_report
assertions.check: report.md contains '## PR Review Report' and '### Review Comments' and '### Retrospective'

assertions.name: conventional_comments_used
assertions.check: findings.json entries use conventional comment labels

assertions.name: at_least_one_praise
assertions.check: findings.json contains at least one praise entry

assertions.name: address_mode_detected
assertions.check: report.md indicates address mode

assertions.name: retrospective_included
assertions.check: report.md contains '### Retrospective' with agent coverage stats

assertions.name: all_comments_addressed
assertions.check: comment-actions.md has an entry for each of the 7 review comments

assertions.name: replies_generated
assertions.check: replies.json exists with entries matching review comment IDs

assertions.name: independent_before_comments
assertions.check: Transcript shows independent review completed before reading comments

assertions.name: multi_agent_coverage
assertions.check: agent-findings/ contains 4 agent JSON files

evals.prompt: Review PR #144 and address any comments
evals.expected_output: Address mode on very large PR. Size warning, handles 30 comments, full workflow.

assertions.name: produced_structured_report
assertions.check: report.md contains structured report sections

assertions.name: conventional_comments_used
assertions.check: Findings use conventional comment format

assertions.name: at_least_one_praise
assertions.check: At least one praise finding present

assertions.name: size_warning_present
assertions.check: Report or size-assessment.md flags PR as oversized (1000+ lines)

assertions.name: ambiguous_prompt_handled
assertions.check: Either asked for clarification or defaulted to address mode given existing comments

assertions.name: retrospective_included
assertions.check: Report contains retrospective section

assertions.name: multi_agent_coverage
assertions.check: 4 agent perspectives represented

assertions.name: independent_before_comments
assertions.check: Independent review before reading comments
